choose.when:
WITH RECURSIVE family_ids AS ( SELECT id FROM family WHERE id = #{param.familyId} AND del_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id FROM family f INNER JOIN family_ids fi ON f.pid = fi.id WHERE f.del_flag = 0 ) SELECT t.id, t.name, t.photo, t.birthday, t.deathday, t.biography, t.story, t.epitaph, t.visitor_action_open, t.family_id, fam.name AS family_name, t.address, t.qr_code_key, t.visit_count, t.message_count, t.create_time, (CASE WHEN t.family_id IS NULL AND (t.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR t.create_by = #{param.currentUserId}) THEN 'member' WHEN t.family_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM family_admin fa WHERE fa.family_id = COALESCE(fam.root_id, fam.id) AND fa.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND fa.role IN ('super_admin','admin')) THEN 'admin' WHEN t.family_id IS NOT NULL AND fam.chief_id = #{param.currentUserId} THEN 'chief' WHEN t.family_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM family_member m WHERE m.family_id = fam.id AND m.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND m.del_flag = 0) THEN 'member' ELSE NULL END) AS myRole FROM tomb t LEFT JOIN family fam ON t.family_id = fam.id AND fam.del_flag = 0
AND t.family_id IN (SELECT id FROM family_ids)
AND (SELECT COALESCE(root_id, id) FROM family WHERE id = #{param.familyId} LIMIT 1) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId})) )
AND t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
AND t.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY t.id DESC
choose.otherwise:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.photo, t.birthday, t.deathday, t.biography, t.story, t.epitaph, t.visitor_action_open, t.family_id, fam.name AS family_name, t.address, t.qr_code_key, t.visit_count, t.message_count, t.create_time, (CASE WHEN t.family_id IS NULL AND (t.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR t.create_by = #{param.currentUserId}) THEN 'member' WHEN t.family_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM family_admin fa WHERE fa.family_id = COALESCE(fam.root_id, fam.id) AND fa.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND fa.role IN ('super_admin','admin')) THEN 'admin' WHEN t.family_id IS NOT NULL AND fam.chief_id = #{param.currentUserId} THEN 'chief' WHEN t.family_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM family_member m WHERE m.family_id = fam.id AND m.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND m.del_flag = 0) THEN 'member' ELSE NULL END) AS myRole FROM tomb t LEFT JOIN family fam ON t.family_id = fam.id AND fam.del_flag = 0
AND ((t.family_id IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) FROM family f WHERE f.id = t.family_id AND f.del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId})) )) OR (t.family_id IS NULL AND (t.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR t.create_by = #{param.currentUserId})))
AND t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
AND t.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY t.id DESC

mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.photo, t.birthday, t.deathday, t.biography, t.story, t.epitaph, t.visitor_action_open, t.family_id, f.name AS family_name, t.address, t.qr_code_key, t.visit_count, t.message_count, t.create_time FROM tomb t LEFT JOIN family f ON t.family_id = f.id AND f.del_flag = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.del_flag = 0

SELECT t.id, t.name, t.photo, t.birthday, t.deathday, t.biography, t.story, t.epitaph, t.visitor_action_open, t.family_id, f.name AS family_name, t.address, t.qr_code_key, t.visit_count, t.message_count, t.create_time FROM tomb t LEFT JOIN family f ON t.family_id = f.id AND f.del_flag = 0 WHERE t.qr_code_key = #{code} AND t.del_flag = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tomb t LEFT JOIN family fam ON t.family_id = fam.id AND fam.del_flag = 0
AND ((t.family_id IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) FROM family f WHERE f.id = t.family_id AND f.del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId})) )) OR (t.family_id IS NULL AND (t.user_id = #{currentUserId} OR t.create_by = #{currentUserId})))
AND t.del_flag = 0
